label: Filter / slice row list
description: Read an array from **sourceVariable** (or JSON string: **array** or single **object** wrapped as one element), optionally keep elements where **filterRunIf** is true (same DSL as step **runIf**; per element, row = parent row merged with the element, or **`_item`** for scalars). Set **invertFilter** to keep elements where the expression is **false** (e.g. exclude status done). Then optional **offset** / **limit**. Writes the result to **saveToVariable** (use before **Loop**).

formSchema.label: Keep element when (optional; same as runIf)
Invert: keep when expression is false
